issue_body_preview:
Currently, the layout of some pages is broken in ios safari.

_Originally posted by @Mennaruuk in https://github.com/ViewTube/viewtube-vue/issues/294#issuecomment-767413503_

I share your feelings about the appearance. I think Invidious looks too simple, and your take on this with ViewTube is aw
test_description_zh: 在 iOS Safari 浏览器（或模拟器）中访问 ViewTube 首页及其他主要页面，观察整体页面布局是否正常渲染，包括导航栏、内容区域、侧边栏等元素的排列和对齐情况。
expected_result_zh: 页面在 iOS Safari 中布局正常，各区域元素正确排列，没有错位、溢出、重叠或断裂现象，与桌面浏览器表现一致。
